## CryptoUtils.tryDecryptCollectionFile() function

Attempts to parse and decrypt a JSON object as an [encrypted collection file](./ts-chocolate.cryptoutils.iencryptedcollectionfile.md)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function tryDecryptCollectionFile(json: JsonObject, key: Uint8Array, cryptoProvider: ICryptoProvider): Promise<Result<JsonObject>>;
```

</td></tr>

</td><td>

</td></tr>

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;Result&lt;JsonObject&gt;&gt;

`Success` with decrypted JSON content, or `Failure` with an error (including if not encrypted)
